title: SQL query 轉去 Relational Algebra

replies.msg:
有冇人識轉，我研究左兩晚都搞唔掂。或者有冇人教弄我？

我嘅 Table:
REP

Rep_Num     Name
---------------------
1           Amy
2           Bosco
3           Cindy
4           Dolores


CUSTOMER

Customer_Num     Name      Rep_Num
-----------------------------------
10               Ada       1
20               Bard      1
30               Card      2
40               Daisy     2
50               Emily     2
60               Farley    4


SQL query:
SELECT
 REP.Rep_Num, COUNT(CUSTOMER.Rep_Num) AS TotalCust
FROM
 REP
LEFT JOIN
 CUSTOMER 
ON
 REP.Rep_Num = CUSTOMER.Rep_Num
GROUP BY
 CUSTOMER.Rep_Num,REP.Rep_Num


預期結果:
Rep_Num   TotalCust
--------------------
1         2
2         3
3         0
4         1

40               Daisy     2
50               Emily     2
60               Farley    4


SQL query:
SELECT
 REP.Rep_Num, COUNT(CUSTOMER.Rep_Num) AS TotalCust
FROM
 REP
LEFT JOIN
 CUSTOMER

 REP.Rep_Num = CUSTOMER.Rep_Num
GROUP BY
 CUSTOMER.Rep_Num,REP.Rep_Num


預期結果:
Rep_Num   TotalCust
--------------------
1         2
2         3
3         0
4         1
最尾GROUP BY 1 或者GROUP BY REP.Rep_Num 就ok
